---
title: "Michaels_solution_for_Sami"
output: md_document
date: "2026-06-30"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(forcats)
library(readr)
```

# Data Import and Preparation

```{r import}
redlist <- read_csv("~/Downloads/SpeciesByKingdomAndClass.csv")
head(redlist)
```

## Add Kingdom Information

```{r add_kingdom}
# Lookup table (all classes from the IUCN page)
kingdom_lookup <- c(
  # ANIMALIA
  "ACTINOPTERYGII" = "ANIMALIA", "AMPHIBIA" = "ANIMALIA",
  "ANTHOZOA" = "ANIMALIA", "ARACHNIDA" = "ANIMALIA",
  "ASTEROIDEA" = "ANIMALIA", "AVES" = "ANIMALIA",
  "BIVALVIA" = "ANIMALIA", "BRANCHIOPODA" = "ANIMALIA",
  "CALCAREA" = "ANIMALIA", "CEPHALOPODA" = "ANIMALIA",
  "CHILOPODA" = "ANIMALIA", "CHONDRICHTHYES" = "ANIMALIA",
  "CLITELLATA" = "ANIMALIA", "COLLEMBOLA" = "ANIMALIA",
  "DEMOSPONGIAE" = "ANIMALIA", "DIPLOPODA" = "ANIMALIA",
  "ECHINOIDEA" = "ANIMALIA", "GASTROPODA" = "ANIMALIA",
  "HEXACTINELLIDA" = "ANIMALIA", "HEXANAUPLIA" = "ANIMALIA",
  "HOLOTHUROIDEA" = "ANIMALIA", "HYDROZOA" = "ANIMALIA",
  "INSECTA" = "ANIMALIA", "MALACOSTRACA" = "ANIMALIA",
  "MAMMALIA" = "ANIMALIA", "MAXILLOPODA" = "ANIMALIA",
  "MEROSTOMATA" = "ANIMALIA", "MONOPLACOPHORA" = "ANIMALIA",
  "MYXINI" = "ANIMALIA", "NEMERTEA" = "ANIMALIA",
  "OSTRACODA" = "ANIMALIA", "PETROMYZONTI" = "ANIMALIA",
  "POLYCHAETA" = "ANIMALIA", "POLYPLACOPHORA" = "ANIMALIA",
  "REPTILIA" = "ANIMALIA", "SARCOPTERYGII" = "ANIMALIA",
  "SOLENOGASTRES" = "ANIMALIA", "TURBELLARIA" = "ANIMALIA",
  "UDEONYCHOPHORA" = "ANIMALIA",
  # CHROMISTA
  "PHAEOPHYCEAE" = "CHROMISTA",
  # FUNGI
  "AGARICOMYCETES" = "FUNGI", "ARTHONIOMYCETES" = "FUNGI",
  "DACRYMYCETES" = "FUNGI", "DOTHIDEOMYCETES" = "FUNGI",
  "EUROTIOMYCETES" = "FUNGI", "EXOBASIDIOMYCETES" = "FUNGI",
  "GEOGLOSSOMYCETES" = "FUNGI", "LECANOROMYCETES" = "FUNGI",
  "LEOTIOMYCETES" = "FUNGI", "NOT ASSIGNED" = "FUNGI",
  "PEZIZOMYCETES" = "FUNGI", "SORDARIOMYCETES" = "FUNGI",
  "USTILAGINOMYCETES" = "FUNGI", "WALLEMIOMYCETES" = "FUNGI",
  # PLANTAE
  "ANDREAEOPSIDA" = "PLANTAE", "ANTHOCEROTOPSIDA" = "PLANTAE",
  "BRYOPSIDA" = "PLANTAE", "CHAROPHYCEAE" = "PLANTAE",
  "CHLOROPHYCEAE" = "PLANTAE", "CYCADOPSIDA" = "PLANTAE",
  "FLORIDEOPHYCEAE" = "PLANTAE", "GINKGOOPSIDA" = "PLANTAE",
  "GNETOPSIDA" = "PLANTAE", "JUNGERMANNIOPSIDA" = "PLANTAE",
  "LILIOPSIDA" = "PLANTAE", "LYCOPODIOPSIDA" = "PLANTAE",
  "MAGNOLIOPSIDA" = "PLANTAE", "MARCHANTIOPSIDA" = "PLANTAE",
  "PINOPSIDA" = "PLANTAE", "POLYPODIOPSIDA" = "PLANTAE",
  "POLYTRICHOPSIDA" = "PLANTAE", "SPHAGNOPSIDA" = "PLANTAE",
  "TAKAKIOPSIDA" = "PLANTAE", "ULVOPHYCEAE" = "PLANTAE"
)

redlist$Kingdom <- kingdom_lookup[redlist$Name]
```

## Data Cleaning

```{r clean}
# Remove unwanted columns
redlist_clean <- redlist %>%
  select(-c("CR(PE)", "CR(PEW)", "Subtotal (EX+EW+ CR(PE)+CR(PEW))")) %>%
  rename(
    Extinct_Subtotal = "Subtotal (EX+EW)",
    Threatened_Subtotal = "Subtotal (threatened spp.)"
  )

# Combine LR/cd and NT into "Near Threatened"
redlist_clean <- redlist_clean %>%
  mutate(
    `Near Threatened` = `LR/cd` + `NT or LR/nt`
  ) %>%
  select(-c("LR/cd", "NT or LR/nt"))

# Readable column names
redlist_clean <- redlist_clean %>%
  rename(
    Extinct = EX,
    Extinct_Wild = EW,
    Critically_Endangered = CR,
    Endangered = EN,
    Vulnerable = VU,
    Least_Concern = `LC or LR/lc`,
    Data_Deficient = DD
  )
```

## Percentage Table

```{r pct_table}
numeric_cols <- redlist_clean %>%
  select(-c(Name, Kingdom, Total)) %>%
  names()

redlist_pct <- redlist_clean %>%
  mutate(
    across(all_of(numeric_cols), ~ (. / Total) * 100),
    Total = 100
  )

colnames(redlist_pct)[colnames(redlist_pct) %in% numeric_cols] <-
  paste0(colnames(redlist_pct)[colnames(redlist_pct) %in% numeric_cols], " [%]")

head(redlist_pct)
```

## Kingdom Plot

```{r kingdom_plot}
kingdom_total <- redlist_clean %>%
  group_by(Kingdom) %>%
  summarise(Total_species = sum(Total, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  filter(Total_species >= 1000)

kingdom_plot_data <- redlist_clean %>%
  filter(Kingdom %in% kingdom_total$Kingdom) %>%
  group_by(Kingdom) %>%
  summarise(
    Extinct = sum(Extinct + Extinct_Wild, na.rm = TRUE),
    Affected = sum(Critically_Endangered + Endangered + Vulnerable, na.rm = TRUE),
    Unaffected = sum(Least_Concern + `Near Threatened` + Data_Deficient, na.rm = TRUE)
  ) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = c(Extinct, Affected, Unaffected),
               names_to = "Category",
               values_to = "Count") %>%
  group_by(Kingdom) %>%
  mutate(Percentage = Count / sum(Count) * 100)

ggplot(kingdom_plot_data, aes(x = Kingdom, y = Percentage, fill = Category)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "stack") +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c("Extinct" = "#D55E00", "Affected" = "#E69F00", "Unaffected" = "#56B4E9"),
    labels = c("Extinct (EX + EW)", "Affected (CR + EN + VU)", "Unaffected / No data")
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Conservation status by Kingdom",
    x = "Kingdom",
    y = "Percentage of species",
    fill = "Category"
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    legend.position = "bottom"
  )
```

## Class Plot

```{r class_plot}
class_cr_pct <- redlist_clean %>%
  mutate(CR_percent = (Critically_Endangered / Total) * 100) %>%
  arrange(desc(CR_percent))

most_affected <- class_cr_pct %>% head(10) %>% mutate(Group = "Most Affected")
least_affected <- class_cr_pct %>%
  filter(CR_percent > 0) %>%
  tail(10) %>%
  mutate(Group = "Least Affected")

plot_data <- bind_rows(most_affected, least_affected) %>%
  mutate(Class = fct_inorder(Name))

ggplot(plot_data, aes(x = Class, y = CR_percent, fill = Kingdom)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity") +
  facet_wrap(~ Group, scales = "free_x") +
  labs(
    title = "Most and least affected Classes (by % Critically Endangered)",
    x = "Class",
    y = "Critically Endangered species (%)",
    fill = "Kingdom"
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, size = 7),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
    legend.position = "bottom"
  )
```
